name: Salesforce

composio_registry_match.name: Salesforce
composio_registry_match.description: Salesforce is a leading CRM platform integrating sales, service, marketing, and analytics to build customer relationships and drive business growth

description: Salesforce is a comprehensive cloud-based customer relationship management (CRM) platform providing sales, customer service, marketing automation, and analytics tools.
notes: Relying on prior knowledge of Salesforce's extensive Developer Experience (DX), REST/GraphQL APIs, and OAuth2 authorization flows, as well as the 184 tools already integrated via Composio.
